summary.description: 2-4 sentences of markdown describing what the agent is doing right now. Present tense, no preamble.

graph.description: Valid Mermaid `graph LR` milestone STORYLINE of the session (a glanceable fingerprint, not a tool-by-tool trace). First node is a rounded subject node naming the session goal in <=5 words tagged :::goal, e.g. G(["Fix login bug"]):::goal. Then 3-6 intent-named PHASE nodes (e.g. "Diagnose token expiry"), never raw tool calls. Mark the current phase :::active (when waiting, append a reason chip and mark THAT). Append-only: extend the previous storyline, do not redraw. Max 6 nodes after the goal node; labels double-quoted and <=5 words. End with: classDef goal fill:#161b22,stroke:#4493f8,color:#fff; and classDef active fill:#1f6feb,stroke:#4493f8,color:#fff;. NO markdown code fences.

topics.description: 3-6 research topics worth reading up on, derived from the agent's current work (libraries/APIs in play, concepts, error messages, unfamiliar terms). Extraction only — do NOT search the web. Skip the trivial/obvious. Keep stable vs the previous topics unless the focus has shifted. Empty array if nothing is worth suggesting.

topic.description: A concise, searchable research topic (<=120 chars), e.g. "React useTransition hook".

reason.description: One short line of provenance grounding the topic in the work (<=160 chars), e.g. "you're editing App.tsx which uses useTransition".
